arts.ttl: 'I think': Sky Sports commentator thinks three Nottingham Forest stars are so important for Nuno
What Crystal Palace need to do to return to winning ways
arts.sum: Still without a Premier League win this season, Oliver Glasner and Palace have plenty to work on. This has in part contributed to a vulnerability to fast breaks - in that situation, only one club has faced more shots than Palace, while only one team has conceded more goals.
